ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-24 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE NOV-19-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MOLNO'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473(A)(1), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To File Second Amended Complaint Pursuant To Ccp Section 473(A)(1); Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Lawrence Mann In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY MOLNO's Motion for Leave to File Second Amended Complaint Pursuant To CCP Section 473(A)(1).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to file a second amended complaint is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
